scripts.test-development: cross-env MOCKED=false METADATA=http://localhost:5051 vitest run --config test/configs/node.config.mts
scripts.test-production: cross-env MOCKED=false METADATA=https://metadata.web3auth.io vitest run --config test/configs/node.config.mts
scripts.browser-tests:local-dev: cross-env MOCKED=false METADATA=http://localhost:5051 vitest run --config test/configs/browsers.config.mts
scripts.browser-tests:local-prod: cross-env MOCKED=false METADATA=https://metadata.web3auth.io vitest run --config test/configs/browsers.config.mts
scripts.browser-tests:cloud-prod: cross-env MOCKED=false METADATA=https://metadata.web3auth.io vitest run --config test/configs/browsers.config.mts
scripts.dev: rimraf dist/ && cross-env NODE_ENV=development torus-scripts build
scripts.build: rimraf dist/ && cross-env NODE_ENV=production torus-scripts build
